div.h2: SHA-256 Sigma Functions: Σ0, Σ1, σ0, σ1

div.p: Round Compression Applied to working var a FIPS §4.1.2 Eq.(4.4)
Round Compression Applied to working var e FIPS §4.1.2 Eq.(4.5)

g.text: BOUNDARY: MESSAGE SCHEDULE (σ) vs COMPRESSION STATE (Σ)

ul.li: σ (sigma): Message Schedule (Lowercase looks like a 'w' or part of it). Used for W expansion. Includes SHR.
Σ (Sigma): State Compression (Uppercase is 'State'). Used in round loops. No SHR allowed.
Index trick: σ0 uses 7/18/3. Σ0 uses 2/13/22. Swap these and your hash will fail all NIST vectors.

g.text: ⚠️ DANGER: DO NOT SWAP σ AND Σ CONSTANTS
